changes: New Game Settings menu in ESC — master audio, SFX, and music toggles with volume slider
Fullscreen toggle moved into Game Settings
Sound effects: sword swings, bow shots, lunges, dashes, shields, parries
Action sounds only play on server-confirmed hits — no more phantom sounds on denied actions
Admin console: configure custom music tracks per day phase
Respawn confirmation: you must click 'Respawn?' after dying instead of auto-respawning
Inactivity kick: idle players are logged out after 5 minutes, tab-hidden players after 1 minute
Improved death notifications: murdered, betrayed, eaten by lions, killed by turrets, and more
Distance bonus: earn +2 Source per kill for every 500 units from the safe zone edge
AI now attacks turrets that shoot at them and breaks through walls to reach them
Lions deal more damage to buildings (3, matching ghosts)
Chase lions are now female (maneless)
Global whitelist now persists across sessions
Player kill notifications show how much Source was lost
Ghost rework: ghosts now track you with their eyes
New ghost burst attack — ghosts shake, make a scary face, and rapid-fire two homing shots
Ghosts periodically phase out while wandering — they become intangible and transparent
Parried ghost projectiles now home onto nearby enemies
Gamepad/controller support with configurable bindings (ESC menu)
Hold right-click to auto-shoot arrows
Performance improvements: viewport culling, snapshot caching, 15Hz tick rate
